specs.dimensions: 3 sizes available (per BBI title) — typically single chair, 2-seat sofa, 3-seat sofa
specs.materials: Open frame structure with seat cushion fastened in place; nylon-zippered access for cushion replacement; fabric/vinyl/leather upholstery
finishes_available: Optional textile programs (Global Carded Textiles, Alliance partners)
key_features: Contemporary lounge seating with sleek cushioning and seamless front upholstery
Open frame design (no traps below seat — durability/cleanability)
Removable seat cushion (nylon-zippered access for replacement)
Healthcare variant: GC Citi (acute and long-term care applications)
Companion: Citi Square line (variants), Citi Square Tables (occasional)
specs.notes: BBI handle 'citi-lounge-seating' confirms Global Citi line
